allow: PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3000/api/works -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty works | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { "name: $\($_.name\)"; "mainImage: $\($_.mainImage\)"; "images count: $\($_.images.Count\)"; "images[0]: $\($_.images[0]\)" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\Projects\\Nika Portfolio"; node build.js; Write-Host "---"; Get-Content manifest.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty works | Select-Object name, isBig, @{n='extraImages';e={$_.images.Count}})

PowerShell(cd "d:\\Projects\\Nika Portfolio"; Get-Content manifest.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty works | Select-Object name, isBig, @{n='extras';e={$_.images.Count}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($m = Get-Content "d:\\Projects\\Nika Portfolio\\manifest.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $b = $m.works | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "Brush Bunny" }; $b.mainImage)
PowerShell($m = Get-Content "d:\\Projects\\Nika Portfolio\\manifest.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $w = $m.works | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "עשן הזמן" }; $w.mainImage)
